message: Payment gateway is down. Multiple customers reporting failed transactions. Ticket raised.
Login service throwing 503 errors intermittently for EU region users.
Payment gateway issue persists. Escalated to infra team. ETA unknown.
Dashboard loading slow for enterprise accounts. Avg load time 12s instead of 2s.
EU login 503 errors resolved after pod restart. Monitoring for recurrence.
Email notification service delayed by ~45 minutes. Backlog of 2000 unsent emails.
Payment gateway partially restored. Transactions succeeding at 70%. Team still working.
New issue: SSL certificate expiring in 3 days for api.company.com. Needs urgent renewal.
Dashboard slowness traced to missing DB index. Fix deployed, load time back to 2s.
Mobile app crashing on Android 14 devices after latest update. 50+ user reports.
